dialogue_texts: It's been a long time since I last visited Mayohiga.
I can't exactly remember when, but probably that time when winter extended into May, I guess?
Given this "glohm" that I need to find, I have not encountered one person with this curse!
Some corruptive substance the Gensokyo Socialite Order is spreading.
That sounds bad. What does it do?
It causes you to isolate from society and trust the Order!
If it ever comes to Mayohiga, I will purify it all I can!
I thought being a shrine maiden was a humanoid-exclusive endeavor.
I didn't know youkai-borns could also undertake the journey!
That's what I am. I trained as one so I could serve my community and defend the town.
Anyway, you look a little nervous. Do you need me to do any purifications of your spirit?
After everything I had just gone through, I think so, even though you're a youkai-born...
Well, I was just being sarcastic.
The danmaku the pixes were throwing at you was just training, and I'm here to give you more.
Let the morning sun and I burn away your doubts!
